titleStmt.title: SII 24.60: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 60. (A.R. No. 120 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Records an undertaking (kaittīṭṭu) by the nivandakkārar to the temple executives for having purchased certain lands from Śrīraṅganātha-Kramavittaṉ and his brothers, of Rājakēsarichchēri, the 8th ward (chēri) in Rājāśrayachaturvēdimaṅgalam in Uṟaiyūrkūṟṟam and provision (nivandam) for reciting Tiruppaḷḷieḻuchchi and Tiruvāymoḻi before god Anantanārāyaṇasvāmi, at the instance of Āyarkoḻundu Chakrapāṇi alias Vīrachōḻa Muṉaiyadarayar of Koṭṭūr in ••••• nāḍu in Arumoḻidēva-vaḷanāḍu. This is evidently connected with No. 57 above where the gift of 50 kaḻañju of poṉ by the donor for the purpose is recorded. The record is dated in the 15th year of the king's reign and the details of the date viz., Kumbha śu. 4, Wednesday, Rēvati, correspond to 1085, A.D., February 1, Saturday (not Wednesday) ·12; ·27.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇaril lakaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil pon nemi yaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarak koṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayir munaik kontaḷavaraicar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḻvalikāṭṭip porppari naṭā
tti kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilappāvai tanimaiyun tavira punitaṟ tiru maṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi tannaṭiyiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇku
ṭai Irunilaviḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāttikaḻa Orutanimeruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivāntarattu pūpar tiṟai viṭu tanta kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karuntalai paruntalaittiṭa tan ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vinnāḷ piṟkulappiṟaipol niṟpiḻaiyennum colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tan
kai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavum Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina vī ramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭain toṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaivirittalamara kuṭaticait tannāḷukantu tānum tāṉaiyum pan
nāḷiṭṭap palapala mutukum payantetir māṟiya jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷā tta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅka maṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷat taṭaittu veḷḷavaru paṟit
talaṅkaḷum poruparittaraṅkamum tantiravāriyum muṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal ten kaṭal pāyvatu polat tanperuñ ceṉaiyai yevip pañcavaraivarum poruta markaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭi Araṇenap ṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭip paṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟa veñcurameṟṟi koṟṟa vijaya stampan ticai toṟum niṟutti muttin calā
pamum muttamiḻp potiyilum mattaveṅkaripaṭumaiyyaccaiyyamum kanniyum kaik koṇṭaruḷit ten vaḷa cum peṟa māveṟiya tan varutanit talaivarai kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷ ḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟalkoḷ siṅhāsanantiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramun tirup puyattakalaṅkaḷum
pola viramun tiyākamum viḷaṅka pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecaripanmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrīku coḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉaiñ cāvatu kumpanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu śatuttiyum putankiḻamai peṟṟa Irevatināyaṟṟu Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkatevar koyilil tiruvāymoḻi viṇṇappañ ceyyum nivan=tak kāṟaril vaṭakarai virutarājapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu taniyūr śrīvīra
nārāyaṇac caruppetimaṅkalattup paṇṭitavaṟcala ceri vaṅkippuṟattu vaṇṭuvarāpati mannaḷayasahaśrīnāna tiruvaraṅkattu nampiyum Ivan makan tiruvālinampiyum Ivan tampi tirukkaḷḷipurattāyanum Ivan tampi tiruviṇṇakar nampiyum Ivan tampi tiruvaraṅkattāyanum Ivvanaivom Āḻvār kanmikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ kaittiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Ittevarkku yāṇṭu 10 5Āvatu Arumoḻiteva vaḷanāṭṭu �ṭṭu koṭṭuruṭaiyā
n Āyakoḻu cakkarapāṇiyāna viracoḻa muṉaiyataraiyar tiruvaraṅkattup paḷḷi koṇṭaruḷukiṟa Anantanārāyaṇasuvāmikku tiruppaḷḷi Eḻucci tiruvāymoḻi viṇṇappac ceyvār rkku nimantamāka keraḷāntakavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu rājāśrayaccaruppetimaṅkalattu Eṭṭāñ ceriya(ā)n rājakecaricceri karāmpic ceṭṭu paṭṭapirān kiramavittan makan ciraṅkanātak kiramavittanum I vā manakkiramavittanu
m Ivan tampicciraṅkanārāyaṇak ciramavittanum Ivan tampi Iyacñayak kirama vittanum Ivan tampi tirumaḻavāṭik kiramavittanum Ivan tampi colaippicān kiramavittanum Āka Ivarkaḷ pakkal nāṅkaḷ vilai koṇṭa nilam piṭākaiyāna maturāntakap periḷamai nāṭṭu kaṟpakamāṇikka vāykkālukkut teṟku caṅkaṇavāykku kiḻakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutal catirattu nilam Irumāvaraiyum Iccey munṟāṅka
ṇṇāṟṟu ñcān catirattu nilam Irumāvaraiyum Āka Innilaṅ kāli nāl melpiṭākaippaṭi nilam mukkālum Icceriyil kārampicceṭṭu vāmanakkirama vittan pakkal vilai koṇṭa nilam mel piṭākai ka vāykkālukku vaṭakkuStops here.
Digital edition of SII 24.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
